title: pelargonium × rubicundum
intro: Pelargonium × rubicundum, also known as Rose Geranium or Red-Leaf Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × rubicundum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures for medicinal use, with some herbal preparations also utilizing the plant's leaves and flowers in infusions, salves, and topical creams.
